eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kitsap; Island; Jefferson; Snohomish; Pierce; King, WA; at 8:20 AM on JUN 9, 2026 Effective until 11:20 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the Snohomish County Department of Emergency Management. Had this been an actual alert, this system would bring you important information.
